top_signals.title: Brent breaches $90 as Middle East risks mount with U.S-Iran tensions on the rise
top_signals.summary: American forces have started ninth consecutive night of strikes against Iranian targets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: CryptoQuant says Strategy still needs disciplined bitcoin buying and selling framework
top_signals.summary: CryptoQuant said Michael Saylor's Strategy still needs still needs clearer rules for when to buy and sell bitcoin.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Upbit parent Dunamu faces South Korean regulator sanctions process: Report
top_signals.summary: Korea’s Virtual Asset User Protection Act lacks explicit sanctions provisions for hacking and similar incidents, clouding the scope of penalties facing the Upbit operator Dunamu.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: In China, people brave simulated typhoons to prepare for the real thing
top_signals.summary: Climate change is increasingly exposing China to destructive weather events, and simulation training sessions are getting its people ready for the real thing.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Allbridge Core pauses cross-chain bridge after $1.65M exploit
top_signals.summary: The attacker allegedly used a flash loan and rapid swaps to manipulate the bridge’s stablecoin exchange rate.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: UNI burn poised to grow as Uniswap governance votes on v4 fees and Robinhood Chain expansion
top_signals.summary: Both proposals route new fees into the UNI burn system created under December's "UNIfication" overhaul, with voting open from July 19 through July 26.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Colombia's New Government Prepares Fossil Fuel Comeback
top_signals.summary: On 21st June, conservative, Trump-endorsed presidential candidate Abelardo de la Espriella won the election by just 1 per cent over Iván Cepeda, who was expected to take over the Socialist Party leadership from current President Gustavo Petro. He will be sworn in as president on 7th August, after which we can expect significant changes across the board. Petro, who was considered Colombia’s first leftist leader, brought about major change during his time in power, overhauling the country’s tax and health systems and supporting…
